steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: The function $f(w)$ gives area in square feet, and $w$ is the width in feet.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: In $f(16)=1{,}280$, the input $16$ means the width is $16$ feet, and the output $1{,}280$ means the area is $1{,}280$ square feet.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: The correct interpretation says that a width of $16$ feet gives an area of $1{,}280$ square feet. The answer is A.
